text:
Created attachment 250883
git diff for net-im/openfire

Changelog:
https://download.igniterealtime.org/openfire/docs/4.8.1/changelog.html

P.S. For this port needed to upload to some server archive with local maven repository:
https://cloud.druba.su/s/3miZmWzwzZZrqKA/download/openfire-4.8.1-deps.tar.gz
P.P.S. Deps archive renamed, like in other maven-depends ports. Changed start script to support several installed openjdk. Poudriere tested successfully.
